DROP TABLE IF EXISTS salaries; CREATE TABLE salaries(`team` String, `player` String, `salary` UInt32, `position` String) Engine = Memory;

INSERT INTO salaries VALUES ('Port Elizabeth Barbarians', 'Gary Chen', 196000, 'F'), ('New Coreystad Archdukes', 'Charles Juarez', 190000, 'F'), ('Port Elizabeth Barbarians', 'Michael Stanley', 100000, 'D'), ('New Coreystad Archdukes', 'Scott Harrison', 180000, 'D'), ('Port Elizabeth Barbarians', 'Robert George', 195000, 'M'), ('South Hampton Seagulls', 'Douglas Benson', 150000, 'M'), ('South Hampton Seagulls', 'James Henderson', 140000, 'M');
SELECT team, player, last_value(salary) OVER (PARTITION BY team ORDER BY salary DESC) AS last_salary FROM salaries;
SELECT team, player, last_value(salary) OVER (PARTITION BY position ORDER BY salary DESC IGNORE NULLS) AS last_salary FROM salaries;
SELECT team, player, last_value(player) OVER (ORDER BY salary ASC RANGE BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND 1 FOLLOWING) AS last_player FROM salaries;
SELECT team, COUNT(*) AS total_players, last_value(salary) OVER (PARTITION BY team ORDER BY salary DESC) AS last_salary FROM salaries GROUP BY team;

SELECT s1.player, s1.salary, last_value(s2.salary) OVER (PARTITION BY s1.team ORDER BY s1.salary DESC) AS last_salary FROM salaries AS s1 JOIN salaries AS s2 ON s1.team = s2.team WHERE s1.salary > 150000;
SELECT team, last_value(player) OVER (ORDER BY salary DESC) AS top_earner FROM (SELECT team, player, salary FROM salaries WHERE salary > 100000) AS filtered_salaries GROUP BY team;
SELECT team, last_value(position) OVER (PARTITION BY team ORDER BY salary DESC RESPECT NULLS) AS last_position FROM salaries;

CREATE TABLE teams(`team_name` String, `location` String) Engine = Memory; INSERT INTO teams VALUES ('Port Elizabeth Barbarians', 'Port Elizabeth'), ('New Coreystad Archdukes', 'Coreystad'), ('South Hampton Seagulls', 'South Hampton');
SELECT t.team_name, s.player, last_value(s.salary) OVER (PARTITION BY t.team_name ORDER BY s.salary DESC) AS last_salary FROM teams AS t JOIN salaries AS s ON t.team_name = s.team;
SELECT DISTINCT team, last_value(salary) OVER (PARTITION BY team ORDER BY salary DESC RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS last_salary FROM salaries;
SELECT team, last_value(player) OVER (ORDER BY salary DESC RESPECT NULLS) AS last_paid_player FROM salaries WHERE salary < 200000;
